title: Build the owner-reviewable Project Chat screen

limits.new_production_dependencies: allow one tree-shakeable icon library; test-only accessibility and DOM dependencies are allowed
limits.architecture_changes: forbid daemon, provider, protocol, persistence and IPC changes

stop_conditions: owner approval is required before merge
the reference direction conflicts with a canonical UX invariant
the renderer implies working Git, diff approval or project mutation
required test fails after two bounded repair attempts
scope expands beyond the single Project Chat renderer screen
